clarification_questions: What was the business purpose of this meal? (e.g., client entertainment, employee travel meal, team meeting, employee benefit, etc.)

output_debit_classifier.reason: This transaction involves a meal purchased with a corporate credit card. However, the business purpose is unclear. Meals can be classified differently depending on context: (1) employee meals during travel (Travel & Entertainment Expense), (2) client entertainment (Meals & Entertainment Expense), (3) employee benefits/perks (Employee Benefits Expense), or (4) office meals for meetings (Office Expense or Meals & Entertainment). Each classification has different tax implications, especially in Canada where only 50% of meals and entertainment expenses are typically deductible. Without knowing the specific business purpose, we cannot accurately classify this expense.
